Title: Grants the gaming commission the authority to develop, and require racetrack operators to implement, fire protection systems requirements for stables and barns
Summary: Grants the gaming commission the authority to develop, and require racetrack operators to implement, fire protection systems requirements for stables and barns used to house horses at racetracks.
LawSection: Racing, Pari-Mutuel Wagering and Breeding Law
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the racing, pari-mutuel wagering and breeding law, in relation to granting the gaming commission the authority to develop, and require racetrack operators to implement, fire protection systems requirements for stables and barns
